description_long: This is a compact, white pickup truck with a utilitarian design, featuring a single cab and a flat, open cargo bed at the rear. The front end displays a slightly worn appearance, with visible dirt and rust marks, round headlights, and a single windshield wiper. The side profile reveals two doors, small side mirrors, and exposed wheel arches, with the cargo bed extending almost the full length of the vehicle behind the cab. The rear view shows the open cargo area, which is bordered by low side panels and a tailgate. The wheels are small and robust, suitable for urban or light industrial use. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, practical vehicle, likely made primarily of metal with some plastic and glass components.
description: A compact, white, single-cab pickup truck with a flat open cargo bed and visible signs of wear and rust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the windshield, single wiper, round headlights, license plate, and some rust and dirt on the bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the single cab, two doors, side mirror, and the full length of the open cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, low side panels, and the tailgate, with both rear wheels visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, two doors, side mirror, and the open cargo bed.
